items.title: After WhatsApp, Telegram and Signal receive notices on username feature
items.summary: The notices follow directions to WhatsApp to pause its username feature over scam and impersonation concerns; Spokespersons for Telegram, Signal did not have an immediate commen...

items.title: Meta quietly launches vibe-coded gaming app Pocket
items.summary: Meta has quietly launched Pocket, an experimental AI app that lets users generate and share interactive mini games using text prompts.

items.title: Spotify Confirms Streaming Fraud After Kalshi Trader Cries Foul
items.summary: One of Kalshi’s most prominent traders tells WIRED he’s swearing off Spotify-related markets until the issue is resolved.
